# Plane task template — copy to config/plane_task_template.local.md and edit.
# Generated by `oc setup` and used by `oc task create` as the default body.
# This file is safe to commit. Your local copy is gitignored.

## Execution
repo: OperationsCenter
base_branch: main
mode: goal
allowed_paths:
  - src/

## Goal
Describe the code change you want Kodo to make.

## Constraints
- Keep the selected base branch within: main
- Limit edits to the listed allowed paths.
- Leave deployment and infrastructure files alone unless explicitly requested.
